channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The whole alley full of litter, 14th July
item.description:
Overflowing litter has again blown everywhere - a regular street sweeping along this path would be really great if possible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several deep potholes, 14th July
item.description:
There are several deep and growing pot holes in the middle of the road that are causing damage to vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Lloyds Place, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all across street, 14th July
item.description:
There's so much litter and rubbish in this area, it's realling bringing the area down.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crown Lane / Crown Lane Spur bin left full and overflowing AS USUAL., 14th July
item.description:
Crown Lane / Crown Lane Spur bin left full and overflowing AS USUAL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane Spur, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newton Terrace bus stop T, Crown Lane bin left full and overflowing AS USUAL., 14th July
item.description:
Newton Terrace bus stop T, Crown Lane bin left full and overflowing AS USUAL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newton Terrace, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged tarmac. Likely to injure cyclists or damage vehicles., 14th July
item.description:
Tarmac has been damaged at the edge of the speed bump. Rest of the ramp is cobbled, tarmac bit is damaged. It’s not breaking off. Risk to cyclists, motorcyclists and pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hornsey Lane, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sainsbury's trolley STILL dumped by Bromley South Station bike rack., 14th July
item.description:
Sainsbury's trolley STILL dumped by Bromley South Station bike rack.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S trolley dumped in Churchill Way, Bromley AS USUAL., 14th July
item.description:
M&S trolley dumped in Churchill Way, Bromley AS USUAL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchill Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 14th July
item.description:
There is food packaging, plastic bag, plastic bottles and cans on the pavement and road on Tabard Street. It has been there three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottle glass on Tabard Street, 14th July
item.description:
There is broken glass bottle on the pavement on Tabard Street. It has been there for two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Great Dover Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem on this street, 14th July
item.description:
Pavements and gutters full of litter... bottles, sweet packets etc... needs proper hand sweeping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame flytipped on pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Single bed frame on pavement, regular flytipping spot on Parish Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of household waste left by public bin, 14th July
item.description:
Bags of domestic waste are regularly left next to or in the public bins in this area. Please collect before foxes rip it open.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 14th July
item.description:
A Fly-tip Medium

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rupert Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Orthopaedic boot dumped, 14th July
item.description:
Large black medical boot left on pavement on Parish Lane, near top of Victor Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General litter & dog mess bags, 14th July
item.description:
This end of the road is always very messy - it is also a magnet for fly tippers as it is not really overlooked. I have never seen any street cleaners here. Perhaps the council could put some dog waste bins here, as dog owners do not seem to understand that leaving their waste bags in the street is nearly as bad as leaving the dog mess itself.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need pruning, 14th July
item.description:
The trees outside our and neighbours houses have grown to the point that, especially with the sorts of high winds we have experienced, they endanger houses and any cabling coming to the houses at roof level.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldegrave Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge trimming on Green Dale, 14th July
item.description:
The hedge on the top section of Green Dale is become overgrown and that has limited the space for cyclists to get past each other and means they end up needing to use to pedestrian path to pass safely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Green Dale, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped crates and other rubbish by post boxes, 14th July
item.description:
Dumped crates and other rubbish by post boxes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 204, Highshore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of various items - kids toys a bike and electronics, 14th July
item.description:
They fly tipped a lot of belongings outside and underneath the property ongoing issue, my cleaners on the estate went through the rubbish and found the address from where the items where disposed off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-72, St Helena Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
